title: Oviedo, Asturias — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Oviedo is a city in Asturias with a population of 220,000. The elegant capital of Asturias with a beautiful Gothic cathedral, pre-Romanesque churches, and excellent quality of life.
